description_long: This is a robust rectangular table with a thick, flat top surface covered in a rich, reddish-brown leather or faux-leather material. The tabletop is supported by four sturdy, blocky wooden legs, each with a slightly angled stance for added stability. The wood has a light, natural finish with visible grain patterns, giving the table a modern yet rustic appearance. The edges of the tabletop are neatly wrapped, with the leather material extending slightly over the sides and corners, creating a soft, cushioned look. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative carvings, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The table's solid construction and materials suggest it is suitable for heavy use in communal or public urban spaces.
description: A sturdy, rectangular table with a thick, reddish-brown leather-covered top and light wood block legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick tabletop with leather overhang and two blocky wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wide, flat tabletop and the full width of the leather covering, with all four legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same thick tabletop and two wooden legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the broad tabletop and all four legs, with the leather surface clearly visible.
